name: Arc Parks and Recreation
description: Arc Parks and Recreation is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Williston, ND. There are 12 hard courts. 6 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include lights, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and youth programming.
